data.description: META PLATFORMS INC. AND NVIDIA CORP. DEEPEN AI ALLIANCE — META WILL DEPLOY “MILLIONS” OF NVIDIA CHIPS INCLUDING BLACKWELL AND FUTURE VERA RUBIN ACCELERATORS, EXPANDING INFRASTRUCTURE TO POWER GLOBAL-SCALE AI SYSTEMS.

data.title: Orange County Community Foundation's report identifies workforce needs for 2026, emphasizing job growth sectors and workforce investment in Irvine, Calif. #OCCF #EconomicOpportunity
data.description: A recent report by the Orange County Community Foundation sheds light on the primary sectors experiencing job growth and emphasizes the importance of strategic investments in the workforce. The OCCF, based in Irvine, California, revealed these insights on February 17, 2026. As one of the leading community foundations in the country, OCCF is known for its rapid expansion and significant impact.

data.title: Goldman Sachs will no longer consider D.E.I. criteria for board members in its latest shift away from diversity requirements.
data.description: The Wall Street firm is pulling back on diversity mandates under the leadership of its CEO, David Solomon. This represents the latest shift away from prioritizing diversity within the company.
IMF JAPAN MISSION CHIEF: CANNOT SPECULATE ON FUTURE ACTIONS BY AUTHORITIES, WHEN ASKED ABOUT CONDITIONS FOR JAPANESE FX INTERVENTION.

data.title: Sompo Group partners with Guidewire for global operations, adopting Cloud Platform apps and tools.
data.description: In a recent collaboration between Sompo Group and Guidewire, it was announced that the two companies have reached a long-term agreement. This agreement will facilitate Sompo's worldwide implementation of Guidewire Cloud Platform applications and tools. This partnership is aimed at enhancing Sompo's operational efficiency and service delivery on a global scale. The agreement is set to have a significant impact on Sompo's operations, leveraging Guidewire's advanced technology solutions.

data.title: Nvidia and Meta Platforms form AI partnership, causing Nvidia's stock to rise. Benefits in multiyear deal.
data.description: On Tuesday, Nvidia revealed a long-term strategic partnership with Meta Platforms, the parent company of Facebook. This collaboration spans multiple years and generations. Following the announcement, Nvidia's stock experienced an increase. The partnership focuses on artificial intelligence technologies.

data.title: MKS stock drops despite beating Q4 targets and first quarter guidance. MKSI stock falls after the news.
data.description: MKS, a supplier of semiconductor equipment, slightly exceeded expectations for the fourth quarter and provided a positive outlook for the first quarter. However, despite this performance, MKS's stock experienced a decline following the announcement. The stock's fall occurred shortly after the company's successful fourth quarter results where it surpassed its targets.

data.title: Palo Alto stock falls after fiscal Q2 beat but underwhelming guidance following acquisition spree.
data.description: The stock of Palo Alto dropped despite surpassing estimates for fiscal Q2 earnings. The cybersecurity company's recent acquisition activity made investors uncertain about its future guidance. The underwhelming guidance contrasted with the positive earnings report.

data.title: Cadence Design Systems exceeded Q4 estimates and forecasts strong growth for 2026, causing CDNS stock to rise.
data.description: Cadence Design Systems exceeded expectations for the fourth quarter and provided a forecast that is above estimates for the upcoming year. The company's stock, CDNS, experienced an increase in value following the announcement. This positive performance was highlighted in an article titled "Cadence Design Systems Tops Expectations in Q4 Earnings, 2026 Outlook" found on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Netflix allows Warner Bros. to make one final offer to Paramount in bidding war. Stocks of all three companies rise.
data.description: Warner Bros. and Paramount have been granted another opportunity to discuss a possible merger by Netflix, with a stipulation for a "best and final offer." Following this news, the stocks of Warner Bros., Paramount, and Netflix saw an increase in value. This move has been seen as the final chance for Paramount in the ongoing bidding war with Warner Bros. All three companies experienced a rise in their stock prices following this development.

data.title: Novo Resources Corp released updated corporate presentation on Feb 17, 2026 in Perth, Australia.
data.description: Novo Resources Corp., trading as Novo, has recently shared its latest corporate presentation on its website. The company, listed on the ASX as NVO, TSX as NVO, and OTCQB as NSRPF, made the announcement on Feb. 17, 2026, in Perth, Australia. The updated presentation contains key information about the company's operations and can be accessed online.

data.title: TJ Maxx & JP Morgan Chase Bank renew long-term retail leases with Empire State Realty Trust for 68,120 sq ft.
data.description: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. revealed today that they have secured long-term renewal leases with TJ Maxx and JP Morgan Chase Bank for retail spaces spanning 46,437 and 21,683 square feet, respectively. TJ Maxx's renewal lease is for their 46,437 square foot space located at 250 W. 57th Street, set for Q4 2025. Richard Skulnik of RIPCO served as the representative for TJ Maxx during the lease discussions. Additionally, JP Morgan Chase Bank renewed their lease for the 21,683 square foot space at One Grand Central.

data.title: SHARC Energy secures $2.0M convertible debenture financing, includes 25% greenshoe option. Not for US distribution.
data.description: This press release is not intended for distribution to US newswire services for dissemination within the United States.

data.title: Hormel Foods sells its whole-bird turkey business to Life-Science Innovations to focus on value-added protein offerings.
data.description: Hormel Foods Corporation, a Fortune 500 company (NYSE: HRL), announced a recent transaction to bolster its strategic move towards offering more value-added protein products. The company's JENNIE-O® brand, with headquarters in Minn., plays a key role in driving profitable growth for Hormel Foods. The announcement was made on Feb. 17, 2026, with operations based in Austin and Willmar, Minn.

data.title: Aurora Cannabis to discuss growth strategy at TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference on Feb. 17, 2026. (Numbers not provided)
data.description: Aurora Cannabis Inc., a prominent global medical cannabis company based in Canada, will be hosting a discussion on their growth strategy, key trends, and market opportunities in Edmonton, AB on Feb. 17, 2026. Listed on both NASDAQ and TSX as ACB, Aurora is recognized as the largest company of its kind in Canada. The discussion will cover various important aspects, as they aim to further solidify their position in the market.

data.title: Hormel Foods projects Q1 net sales at $3 billion; anticipates Q1 diluted EPS at $0.33. Selling whole-bird turkey biz.
data.description: Anticipating first-quarter net sales to reach $3 billion, with a 2% growth in organic net sales. Predicting a first-quarter diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.33, and an adjusted diluted EPS of $0.34. Additionally, disclosed a definitive agreement to sell the whole-bird turkey business. Will be participating in the 2026 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference.
